competitors.title: Top 10 Generative AI Tools for Data Scientists in 2026 | Learnomate
key_points: Focuses on generative AI tools: OpenAI API, LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Google Vertex AI, Microsoft Azure OpenAI, Pinecone Vector Database.
Generative AI shifts from experimental to real-world data science workflows.
Enables synthetic data generation, AI copilots, feature engineering automation.
OpenAI API can generate SQL queries, Python code, transformation logic.
Vector databases essential for RAG applications.
